name: Hot German Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 slices Bacon, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook bacon until crisp. Once cooked, remove the bacon and set it aside.
2. Return 2 tablespoons of the rendered fat to the skillet. Add onions (if using), vinegar, sugar, water, salt, and pepper. Cook until the onions are tender.
3. Stir in the rice, grated carrot, and chopped parsley. Heat through for about 5 minutes.
This sauce is essentially the same as that used for German potato salad; simply add celery seed if desired. It also pairs well with lightly sautéed cabbage.
